## Meeting Purpose

[Introductory call between Marcel Santilli (GrowthX.AI) and Neesha A. Tambe to explore potential collaboration opportunities.](https://fathom.video/share/nfkgfb8oV8T3rry5RZZYrAFDTSdgcfsc?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Marcel's company GrowthX.AI has grown rapidly, reaching $11M revenue and 75 employees in \~1 year](https://fathom.video/share/nfkgfb8oV8T3rry5RZZYrAFDTSdgcfsc?tab=summary&timestamp=6.0)
  - [GrowthX.AI combines AI, expert workflows, and managed services to deliver high-quality content at scale](https://fathom.video/share/nfkgfb8oV8T3rry5RZZYrAFDTSdgcfsc?tab=summary&timestamp=10.0)
  - [Neesha has extensive experience in startup ecosystems, content, and strategic programs at TechCrunch and Anthropic](https://fathom.video/share/nfkgfb8oV8T3rry5RZZYrAFDTSdgcfsc?tab=summary&timestamp=489.0)
  - [Both see strong potential alignment and are interested in further discussions](https://fathom.video/share/nfkgfb8oV8T3rry5RZZYrAFDTSdgcfsc?tab=summary&timestamp=1546.0)

## Topics

### Company Background: GrowthX.AI

  - [Founded by Marcel \~1 year ago, bootstrapped to $5M revenue before raising Series A](https://fathom.video/share/nfkgfb8oV8T3rry5RZZYrAFDTSdgcfsc?tab=summary&timestamp=1440.0)
  - [Now at $11M revenue, 75 employees, raising Series B](https://fathom.video/share/nfkgfb8oV8T3rry5RZZYrAFDTSdgcfsc?tab=summary&timestamp=1440.0)
  - [Offers AI-powered content creation and publishing as a managed service](https://fathom.video/share/nfkgfb8oV8T3rry5RZZYrAFDTSdgcfsc?tab=summary&timestamp=1394.0)
  - [Built proprietary platform with coding agents, workflows, and context-aware AI editing](https://fathom.video/share/nfkgfb8oV8T3rry5RZZYrAFDTSdgcfsc?tab=summary&timestamp=1252.0)

### Marcel's Professional Journey

  - [Started at IBM, innovated content marketing approaches](https://fathom.video/share/nfkgfb8oV8T3rry5RZZYrAFDTSdgcfsc?tab=summary&timestamp=724.0)
  - [Worked at HP, HashiCorp, Scale AI in marketing leadership roles](https://fathom.video/share/nfkgfb8oV8T3rry5RZZYrAFDTSdgcfsc?tab=summary&timestamp=735.0)
  - [Left corporate job to start GrowthX.AI after successful paid workshops](https://fathom.video/share/nfkgfb8oV8T3rry5RZZYrAFDTSdgcfsc?tab=summary&timestamp=1070.0)

### Neesha's Background

  - [10 years at TechCrunch, ran Startup Battlefield program](https://fathom.video/share/nfkgfb8oV8T3rry5RZZYrAFDTSdgcfsc?tab=summary&timestamp=447.0)
  - [Recently left Anthropic where she led strategic programs in go-to-market](https://fathom.video/share/nfkgfb8oV8T3rry5RZZYrAFDTSdgcfsc?tab=summary&timestamp=489.0)
  - [Expertise spans content, startups, community building](https://fathom.video/share/nfkgfb8oV8T3rry5RZZYrAFDTSdgcfsc?tab=summary&timestamp=561.0)

### GrowthX.AI's Approach

  - [Combines AI, expert workflows, and managed services](https://fathom.video/share/nfkgfb8oV8T3rry5RZZYrAFDTSdgcfsc?tab=summary&timestamp=1394.0)
  - [Aims to deliver high-quality content at \~$0.10/word vs $1-2/word](https://fathom.video/share/nfkgfb8oV8T3rry5RZZYrAFDTSdgcfsc?tab=summary&timestamp=1400.0)
  - [Built coding agent to generate workflows as maintainable code](https://fathom.video/share/nfkgfb8oV8T3rry5RZZYrAFDTSdgcfsc?tab=summary&timestamp=1232.0)
  - [Launching AIledgrowth.com community for marketing/recruiting](https://fathom.video/share/nfkgfb8oV8T3rry5RZZYrAFDTSdgcfsc?tab=summary&timestamp=1448.0)

### Mutual Interest

  - [Neesha sees strong potential fit given her experience](https://fathom.video/share/nfkgfb8oV8T3rry5RZZYrAFDTSdgcfsc?tab=summary&timestamp=1546.0)
  - [Marcel very interested in exploring opportunities to work together](https://fathom.video/share/nfkgfb8oV8T3rry5RZZYrAFDTSdgcfsc?tab=summary&timestamp=1529.0)
  - [Both agree on importance of team/culture fit](https://fathom.video/share/nfkgfb8oV8T3rry5RZZYrAFDTSdgcfsc?tab=summary&timestamp=1598.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Marcel to text Neesha to coordinate in-person coffee meeting](https://fathom.video/share/nfkgfb8oV8T3rry5RZZYrAFDTSdgcfsc?tab=summary&timestamp=1681.0)
  - [Neesha to visit GrowthX.AI office to learn more](https://fathom.video/share/nfkgfb8oV8T3rry5RZZYrAFDTSdgcfsc?tab=summary&timestamp=1672.0)
  - [Continue discussions to explore potential collaboration](https://fathom.video/share/nfkgfb8oV8T3rry5RZZYrAFDTSdgcfsc?tab=summary&timestamp=1697.0)
